page_metadata.biotools__summary: Enriched heatmap is a special type of heatmap which visualizes the enrichment of genomic signals on specific target regions. Here we implement Enriched heatmap by ComplexHeatmap package.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Enriched heatmap is a special type of heatmap which visualizes the enrichment of genomic signals on specific target regions. Here we implement Enriched heatmap by ComplexHeatmap package.
